canonical_answer: A young boy in a white t-shirt sits at a wooden table with a bunk bed behind him. Hands hold various markers, including green and teal ones, over sheets of paper while writing and drawing actions occur, creating black ink lines on white paper surfaces. Objects like a yellow box, smartphone, and highlighters rest on the light-colored wooden table.
